title: Meeting of the World
overview: It's the "Meeting Of The World", and all the nations must come together to solve whatever global problems they can. However, after America starts the conference off on a bizarre note, can the gathered nations even solve the problems they have with each other? After this, it's a leap back in time to WWI...

title: WWI
overview: It's WWI, and Germany, in search of the heir to the legendary Roman Empire, discovers an abandoned tomato crate sitting in the middle of the woods. However, even Germany finds himself unprepared to deal with the strange descendant of Rome.

title: WWI is Over
overview: Italy is sent back home after annoying Germany, but Germany quickly finds that ditching the cowardly nation is a task easier said than done. Especially when WWII nears and Italy takes it upon himself to declare that he's now Germany's ally.

title: Meet Japan
overview: Meet Japan. He's the newest ally to Italy and Germany, and a powerful nation in his own right. But with having been isolated from the rest of the world for over 200 years, what he sees as his "normal" behavior comes off as extraordinary to others.

title: Shouting S.O.S at the Center of the World!
overview: An endless blue sky, pure white clouds, and a shining sea. Normally it would be just your average trip to the beach. In the case of Germany, Italy, and Japan? They've been stranded on a mysterious island in the southern sea, their S.O.S message having gone ignored as the three of them make the most of their "vacation".

title: Roasting Marshmallows
overview: Germany reflects on times spent around Austria. Meanwhile, unbeknownst to the three stranded nations, they've got company on the island and are being watched from afar, even when they're roasting marshmallows at their campfire.

title: Introducing Romano
overview: Italy introduces his older brother, Romano (who represents the southern half of their country), to Germany. But while Italy himself can't get enough of Germany, the foul-mouthed Romano will try anything to make sure that the "potato freak" stays away from his brother. Anything.

title: Italy Kidnapped
overview: Some days, Italy just can't get a break. Especially when he winds up tricked and kidnapped, not once, but twice by the Allied Forces. But once Germany gets involved, it seems the third time may be the charm... though in whose favor, exactly?

title: Allied Forces Meeting
overview: The Allied Forces meet to discuss plans to take down the Axis, but despite their image as a "team" (America as the "hero" and everyone else acting as his backups), they find it difficult to get along and agree with each other.

title: France Reflects
overview: After he winds up uninvited to the second Allies meeting, France reflects on his history of past "glories" and "accomplishments".

title: Holy Roman Empire Ultimatum
overview: In the climax to the Chibitalia sub-storyline, Holy Roman Empire gives the younger Italy the ultimatum: Will he become the new Roman Empire with him or not? Later on, in 1940, England finds that he still has friends outside of the Allies to count on to cheer him up...

title: England, I Have Something to Tell You
overview: "England, I have something to tell you." In a brief jump forward to 1956, a gloomy and war-torn France proposes to England, who quickly learns the "joke" is indeed on him... and he won't go down that easily. Back in 1940, the Axis Powers train to take on England, and Italy gets a quick and confusing lesson in "culture clash".

title: Summoning the Devil
overview: After being defeated by Germany, a frustrated England vows to get revenge with the strongest method known to man: Summoning the devil to lay a curse on him. Will he succeed in his ritual, or get something even WORSE than what he expected?

title: Supermarket Chaos
overview: The Germans' attempt at training the Italian Army doesn't go as planned, as they soon find that the men are quicker at the art of escape, rather than combat. Later: It's just another day in the life of Germany, as he attempts to brave the wait and chaos in a never-ending line at the supermarket.

title: Strange Foreign Culture and Behaviors
overview: Japan struggles to fit in with the Axis and their strange foreign culture and behaviors, while Italy attempts to help him adjust to life outside of his own land.

title: China Meets Japan
overview: In a tale of times past, a younger China meets a strange small nation known as Japan. He takes it upon himself to try to raise Japan as his younger brother, but soon discovers that there's more to the growing youngster than he thought. And he may not be prepared to deal with the sudden changes...

title: America's Storage Room Cleaning (1)
overview: America decides to finally enter his long-abandoned storage room to clean it out, but the memories he finds in there may prove to be too hard to let go of.

title: The Allied Forces Make Their Move
overview: The Allied Forces make their move and attempt to take down the Axis, but wind up constantly distracted by a "special guest" on the island, a supernatural stranger that Italy seems to know rather well...

title: Top Secret Plans
overview: The Allied Forces attempt to get back to business, despite China arriving late for their meeting. But little do they know, they have a surprise guest (or two) in their room, listening in on their "top secret" plans.

title: America's Storage Room Cleaning (2)
overview: The old musket in America's storage room brings back another memory of times long past: The Revolutionary War.

title: Sealand
overview: Sealand, the world's smallest "nation", attends a world conference in an attempt to be recognized, but finds that respect and acknowledgment from the others is harder to obtain than he thinks.

title: Holy Roman Empire Departs for War
overview: Holy Roman Empire gets ready to depart for war, but Chibitalia won't let him leave that easily, and not without one last gift.

title: Liechtenstein and Italy's Embarrassing Situation
overview: Liechtenstein adjusts to her new life with her brother Switzerland. Elsewhere, Italy gets stuck in an embarrassing situation with his own brother.

title: Switzerland and Liechtenstein Run into Austria
overview: While out shopping, Switzerland and Liechtenstein run into Austria, much to Switzerland's displeasure. Meanwhile, the Axis Powers are still deserted on an island, but come across a most unusual sight in the middle of a forest.

title: England Raises the Young America
overview: In a past tale, England raises the young America and treats him to his own "special" brand of cooking. Meanwhile, as the Liechtenstein and Her Beloved Brother arc comes to a close, Switzerland finds himself reminded of his lapsed friendship with Austria.

title: Busby's Chair
overview: America unveils a new plane, much to England's chagrin and lets out a secret. Later, England uses Busby's Chair to get revenge on America during an Allied summit, only for Russia to sit on the chair first and destroy it by out-evilling it. England reveals his drunk side when in a bar with America (who England is trying to coax information out of). Then Episode 18 is continued, with England attempting to use Busby's Chair once the Axis are surrounded, although Russia sits on it yet again...

title: Germany's Diary
overview: The Allied Forces, in their ongoing fight against the Axis Powers, manage to get ahold of one of Germany's prized possessions: an observation diary dealing with Italy's strange behavior and uselessness in combat.

title: :) in the World
overview: The Axis are ambushed by the Allies once more, but another strange visitor arrives to break up the fight, with Christmas presents in tow.

title: Vodka and Parachutes
overview: Russia decides to jump out of a plane without a parachute, and England and France comment on how he broke all his bones. Then, the audience is introduced to the Baltics, although Latvia has a tendency to say the wrong thing at times. After that, America injures himself when England offers him some ice cream.

title: The Ghost Culture of England and Japan
overview: After having formed an alliance, England visits Japan's home but finds mysterious creatures that even Japan himself is unable to see or believe in anymore.

title: Academy Hetalia Christmas
overview: In a universe similar yet different from this one, three students at the Academy Of The World decide to survey the others on how they spend their winter holiday.

title: With Grandpa Rome
overview: Germany wakes up to find himself visited by Italy's grandfather, the Roman Empire. But didn't he fall long ago? And is it a dream, or something stranger?

title: Wish on a Star
overview: While camping out in the middle of a war front, Germany and Italy both make wishes on a shooting star, but which one will come true?

title: Germany in Italy
overview: Adapts more of Hello World, Hello Italy!: Italy shows Japan his combat recordbook (which turns out to be impressive in a different way), Germany decides to go sightseeing in Italy and attempts to blend in, the Axis are given special bentou, and Japan invents nikujaga. In another story, America ponders the mystery of who draws the sketches of the Axis and Allies on the blackboard...

title: Canada's Missing
overview: Canada arrives late to a G8 meeting, but his absence and identity are barely recognized by the other nations. In another story, France decides to celebrate the Olympics.

title: Why Americans Love Spring
overview: America and Japan both prepare for the New Year and the coming of spring.

title: Russia is Germany's New Best Friend?
overview: Russia and Germany form an alliance, while Italy fears that the other Axis Powers will eventually abandon him.

title: More Canada
overview: Continuation of The Pact Of Steel, along with more of Fly, Canada-san, Fly!

title: The Battle for America (1)
overview: A baby America is discovered in the "New World", though this discovery also sets off a fight for ownership of him.

title: The Battle for America (2)
overview: Continuation of The Battle For America: England and France continue their fight over the young America.

title: France's War Style
overview: Adapts Big Brother France And The Information Manipulation Activities! and Reduce Your Opponents' Willpower, American-style!.

title: Russia's Sisters (1)
overview: Russia tells the story of his sisters, Ukraine and Belarus.

title: Russia's Sisters (2)
overview: Part two of the Russia's Big And Little Sisters story.

title: Canada and Switzerland's Aggression
overview: Switzerland tries to teach Liechtenstein self-defense. In other segments: Japan finds America's strange desserts photograph-worthy, while Canada (in more of Fly, Canada-san, Fly!) tries to tell America off but fails.

title: Liechtenstein Begins
overview: The origin of Liechtenstein is detailed.

title: Medieval England's Clothes and Hair
overview: England is the perpetual bed-head, and we go back to the past to remember a time when France was at his most flamboyant and mischievous - teasing England by showing off his long hair, and then cutting England's hair when his own plan to grow his hair long doesn't go according to plan.

title: England Visits Poland and Bemoans America
overview: England and France visit Poland, who has recently bought a fleet of ponies to help him in the war. In other stories: Chibitalia feels sad over the departure of Holy Roman Empire, while England finds that America grows up too fast.

title: England's Secret Weapon
overview: England's latest secret weapon to win the war is a failure. In another story, Chibitalia finally grows up, but one change is a shock to Austria.

title: Japan Westernizes and Canada Flies
overview: Adapts from Japan And The Footsteps Of Westernization, along with a segment from Fly, Canada-san, Fly!.

title: Japan Keeps Westernizing
overview: More of Japan And The Footsteps Of Westernization'.

title: America and Ghosts
overview: Adapts America's Situation With Ghosts.

title: Holy Rome and More Canada
overview: Adapts more of Fly, Canada-san, Fly! and Holy Roman Empire's Playtime In The River.

title: Diary of The Awesome Me: Volume 128
overview: Features the story of Prussia, when he was a child as the Teutonic Knights. In other stories: Romano attempts yet again to stop Germany from being with his younger brother, while Canada and America wind up playing a game of "catch" that becomes chaotic.

title: Greece and Japan's Relationship
overview: Greece and Japan get to know each other more. In another story, Chibitalia and Holy Roman Empire celebrate the Cat Festival.

title: Greece and Japan's All-Too Slow-Paced World
overview: The continuation of Greece and Japan's story, featuring the first anime appearance of Turkey.

title: The Plot to Conquer Poland
overview: An episode featuring Poland and Lithuania, adapting part of Pact of Steel. Also features the strip France vs. Italy.

title: Warsaw Letter
overview: The continuation of Poland and Lithuania's story, plus part of the strip England Catches A Cold.

title: America's Cold Cure
overview: Continues the story of England's cold. In another story: China is tired of being pushed around by the other Allies.

title: Big Brother France and the Frying Pan
overview: Hungary hears a message from God telling her to hit France with a frying pan. In other stories: England attempts to become stronger, and Italy visits France.

title: Italy Observation Diary
overview: Germany details another observation diary about Italy, while a glimpse at the relationship of their ancestors is provided. The story of Boss Spain's Control of Southern Italy also begins.

title: Spain the Boss and Chibi Romano
overview: The story of Boss Spain's Control of Southern Italy continues, along with another story about Rome and Germania and one about Italy's reckless driving.

title: Switzerland and the Banks
overview: Adapts from the strips In Just Two Minutes, You Can Grasp the Exterior of the European Economy, as well as more of Boss Spain.

title: Chinese Copy
overview: China gets help from Japan on bootlegging, while in other stories: The Italy brothers wind up captured by England, and Germany learns that the Italian behavior is infectious.

title: Maria Theresa and the War of Austrian Succession
overview: The War of Austrian Succession starts.

title: Reinforcement from Hungary
overview: The War of Austrian Succession starts.

title: Roswell Incident
overview: Tony lands at Roswell.

title: An Ally Country's Lunchbox
overview: More fun with Holy Roman Empire and Chibitalia, and the story of Boss Spain's Control of Southern Italy continues. Japan and Greece decide to get angry.

title: Spain and His Henchman's Depression
overview: Chibi Romano decides to travel home for three days, but Boss Spain is worried, so he follows him, only to find someone else showing interest.

title: Lazy Japan's Anger
overview: Japan and Greece try to get angry. Finland and Sweden are living together on the road.

title: And Then Came Poland
overview: Finland and Sweden visit Poland, and also run into Estonia and Latvia, to Finland's delight. Sweden wants to take Latvia and Estonia which displeases Poland.

title: How Everyone Spent Their Christmas
overview: Italy and Germany wait for Christmas Day. America brings his Christmas celebration to England, along with a surprise for the Christmas tree.

title: The Moon, the Unsocial Guy, the Old Man, and Italy
overview: Italy is worried Germany hates him. However, on his way to talk with Germany, he accidentally stumbles dangerously into Switzerland's territory. America invites Japan to next year's Christmas party.

title: Anglo-Japanese Alliance
overview: England goes in search of friends, and while he hits it off well with Japan, Japan's boss has other plans.

title: The Anglo-Japanese Alliance has been formed
overview: The Anglo-Japanese Alliance story continues.

title: The Annexation of Austria
overview: Austria winds up having to live with Germany in the story of The Austrian Anschluss. Chibi Romano is confronted by a mysterious masked man wielding a sword (Turkey).

title: Boss and the Big Boss (1)
overview: Spain sets out to rescue Romano from Turkey.

title: Boss and the Big Boss (2)
overview: Finishes the story of Boss Spain's Control of Southern Italy, part 2.

title: Salted Salmon, Germany, and I
overview: Adapts Salted Salmon and If the World Was All About Cats...

title: A Slight Feeling of Responsibility
overview: Continues the Salted Salmon story.

title: Chinese-style Mini Revolution
overview: Finishes the Salted Salmon story.

title: Court and Aristocracy
overview: Austria and Germany argue over whether Beethoven is an Austrian or a German. Meanwhile, France spies on both of them and is then caught taking pictures of Austria at England's request.

title: Let's Think About the G8 Members!
overview: England discusses the G8. Meanwhile, Finland discusses his time with Russia to Sweden. Also, another Nekotalia story about the tuna crisis with the cat clan while Japaneko neglects.

title: China's (A Little Too Early) Start of the Age of Exploration
overview: China goes back to his homeland and brings some souvenirs to the Emperor. Meanwhile in Nekotalia, Russicat tries to separate Romanoneko and Itaneko while Germouser wakes Caustria.

title: Can't Escape from Italy
overview: Sealand searches for someone to join forces with. Meanwhile, Romano and Italy look England up and argue over who will keep watch over him.

title: Escape from Italy
overview: England escapes once again after being caught by Germany. In order not to get caught easily, England disguises himself as a "handsome" Italian. Meanwhile, France talks to himself about how the world is going to end soon.

title: Can't Escape from Italy (Conclusion)
overview: Concludes of Can't Escape from Italy.

title: United States of Hetalia (1)
overview: Germany and Italy find that they've once more become shipwrecked on a mysterious island.

title: Japan's Emotions
overview: Chibitalia puts a ban on boats in the Venice canal. In another story, Switzerland turns out to be a lot different than Japan had thought.

title: The Yoke of the Tartars
overview: The audience learns a bit more about the art of punchlines. Meanwhile, in the distant past, a young Lithuania meets a mysterious little boy...

title: Prussia and Hungary
overview: Prussia finds a wounded Hungary in a bush (The Awesome Frantic Me).

title: The Awesome Frantic Me
overview: Hungary remembered that Prussia was surrounded by men from birth and she realized why he acted like that. After Hungary experienced a few events,she settled down in Austria's home. In another story, Italy modified Germany's Kubelwagen without permission again.

title: Eastern Europe While Totally Being Pushed Around By Poland
overview: A young Lithuania learns about his neighbors from Hungary. America wants a convenience store like Japan unlike all the delis in his home. Spain and Romano are visited by a large number of baby sea turtles.

title: Fashion (History) Repeats Itself
overview: 11th century England is uncomfortable with France's fondness of dressing in girly clothes.

title: Boss Spain and Chibi Romano: The Battle of Garigliano
overview: Spain fights with France over Chibi Romano. Belgium and Netherlands comes to visit them.

title: The First Time Poland Rule Was Used! (1)
overview: In the 15th century, the King of Lithuania gets married and the country forms an alliance with Poland.

title: The First Time Poland Rule Was Used! (2)
overview: Poland and Lithuania share interesting stories about their capital cities.

title: United States of Hetalia (2)
overview: After intercepting a message, the Allies travel to a beach to meet up with the Axis Powers. However, America and China get separated from the others and have to survive on their own. Also, Poland and Lithuania play chess.

title: Japan and America (1)
overview: America goes to Japan to becomes friends with him and to do some whaling.

title: Japan and America (2)
overview: America continues on his mission to get Japan to open up. When England learns about his adventure, he offers to be America's friend.

title: Kick-Off of the Battlefield
overview: France is stranded on an island with Italy, only to discover that England and Russia are there too, and they're attacking Germany. So is Japan, America, China, and the native islander, Seychelles. During World War One, Germany and England play a football match making a 360 turn finale for the series.

title: Each Battlefield
overview: Japan explains the true nature of a ninja's shuriken. Wartime leaves the Axis with a lack of coffee, and Germany is assigned to come up with an alternative. Italy shows off his new tanks, which prove to be quite dangerous.

title: Gakuen Hetalia: Go Forth! Newspaper Club!! (1)
overview: The newspaper club, which consists of Germany, Italy, and Japan, decide to interview all of the clubs in the school, including the choir club, the Soviet club, the hero club, the Gourmet club, and the magic club.

title: Gakuen Hetalia: Go Forth! Newspaper Club!! (2)
overview: The newspaper club goes on to interview the Nordic club, the Canada club, the elephant appreciation club, the music club, the swim team, and the... "Going Home" club?

title: Russia and Friends
overview: Little Russia is picked on by Mongolia, Denmark, and Sweden, is freaked out by Little Ukraine, is rejected by a hamster, and fights the Battle on the Ice against the Teutonic Order (Prussia).

title: Though I May Depart, You Shall Remain
overview: After meeting France, a Parisian mortal ponders what it means to live forever.

title: Romano's Diary
overview: In which Chibi Romano is a cute tsundere who really does care for Spain (even though he has an odd way of showing it).

title: Things that Often Happen When Rooming with an American
overview: Japan stays over at America's place for a while. Extreme culture-conflict ensues.

title: The Gentle Fight Between Russia and I
overview: Estonia finds all his websites hacked with each site displaying a drawing of Chibi Russia. Immediately, Estonia accuses Russia of the dirty deed, but naturally Russia denies it. In order to solve the mystery, Estonia hires America to trace the hack.

title: At Netherlands
overview: The reason for Netherlands' obsessive concern about money is revealed.

title: "Turkey&!"
overview: Greece's philosophical side makes an appearance, and more is revealed about his strange relationship with Turkey. Meanwhile, Italy and Turkey discuss the times when Chibitalia used to beat up Turkey, much to the surprise and disbelief of Germany.

title: Our Failure
overview: All of the countries are threatened with "embarrassing" photos to come to an April Fool's gathering in even more embarrassing costumes.

title: Merry Halloween!
overview: It's Halloween night, and America wants Japan to help him finally win a Halloween prank war against undefeated England.

title: Finding Santa
overview: Santa's missing and Finland is in a crisis, so he pleads for the other nations to spread the holiday cheer this Christmas until Santa can be found.

title: Brother, we are...!!
overview: The countries are rated by how fast they walk. Prussia and Germany are caught infiltrating an American military camp.

title: A bientôt! Until We Meet Again!
overview: France meets a girl and takes her on a tour. They discuss the Hundred Years War, Joan of Arc, and what she means to France.

title: What Italy Forgot
overview: England tells Seychelles that the Prince of England and his wife are going to her place for their honeymoon, but she must keep it secret. In another story, Italy forgets his gun during WW1, which is later found by Germany.

title: Hetalia of the Dead (1)
overview: The countries watch and discuss horror films from each of their countries.

title: Hetalia of the Dead (2)
overview: The countries watch more horror films, and realize that horror films from other countries are weird. India and New Zealand make an appearance.

title: Keep on moving!! March Forward, Sealand!
overview: Sealand tries to make a new friend: the newest micronation, Wy.

title: It's the First Anniversary! The Tripartite Pact
overview: The Axis Powers celebrate the first anniversary of the Tripartite Pact.

title: Nekotalia Once Again
overview: Shows a little more from the neko nations, such as France-cat's taste in his Parisian home, and introduces Spain-cat and Turkey-cat.

title: Let's Eat Military Rations!
overview: The Axis as well as England and America try to manufacture food that stays edible during war. England gets a little surprise during tea time.

title: Meeting of the Nordic
overview: Iceland feels like there's something a bit off about today's Nordic meeting. Meanwhile, Estonia wants to join the Nordics.

title: The Nordic Five +α
overview: A little bit of background information is given about the five Nordic states. Estonia is still trying to become a Nordic, much to the displeasure of the other two Baltics.

title: The Life of the Great Man, the Awesome Me
overview: Prussia tells the tale of how countries that once made up the Holy Roman Empire became unified as one country. A brief summary is shown about the history of beer.

title: African War Front! (1)
overview: Germany looks to book smarts to figure out how to deal with Italy. Italy travels to Africa, only to end up running away from England.

title: African War Front! (2)
overview: America joins England on the African battlefront, much to England's displeasure.

title: Nordics à la Carte
overview: In a past tale, Norway fights alongside Denmark in blizzard-like conditions to fight off Sweden's attacks. Denmark realizes how much of an affect he's had on his old friend, Norway.

title: It's a Pandora Box of Countries! (1)
overview: Sealand, Wy, and Seborga go out to make some new friends with other micronations.

title: It's a Pandora Box of Countries! (2)
overview: Sealand, Wy, Seborga, and recently joined Molossia continue their search for micronation friends.

title: Davie
overview: America, while still a young colony, meets a human boy named Davie. Davie shows him a beautiful flower in a book, which causes America to search far and wide for it. But in the end, America learns what it truly means to be immortal.

title: Liberté, égalité, fraternité and…
overview: France takes a moment to remind the world of his beauty, only to be interrupted by Germany. France and England later bicker over how to deal with the Axis during a meeting of the Allies.

title: Together with Russia
overview: Russia ends up being late to a meeting of the Allies. He later visits his old friend, Lithuania. China gets a chance to see one of his old colonies, Hong Kong.

title: Canada and His Neighbors
overview: Canada thinks back to when he was a new colony, and when France fought for him, (as brief as it might have been). But, as always, he ends up being outshone by his twin. A little insight on Mexico's opinion of him is given.

title: In those days, Chibi-chan was…
overview: Italy takes a little walk in the Vatican with Japan, thinking about times in old Italy. Italy and Germany do something together while in a military tent.
